phases.title: Backend functions
phases.description:
Goal: Copy all 11 backend serverless functions from the imported source into /backend/.

Source → target mapping rows:
| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/getBookings.ts | /backend/bookings/getBookings.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/createBooking.ts | /backend/bookings/createBooking.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/cancelBooking.ts | /backend/bookings/cancelBooking.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/updateBooking.ts | /backend/bookings/updateBooking.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/allotments/getAllotments.ts | /backend/allotments/getAllotments.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/allotments/getAvailability.ts | /backend/allotments/getAvailability.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/changes/getChanges.ts | /backend/changes/getChanges.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getChangesReport.ts | /backend/reports/getChangesReport.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getFullReport.ts | /backend/reports/getFullReport.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getPayments.ts | /backend/reports/getPayments.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getRoomingList.ts | /backend/reports/getRoomingList.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |

Tool selection rule: Class A → copy file.
Row ordering: All files are independent; copy in any order.
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
phases.notes: All 11 backend functions copied byte-identical: /backend/bookings/ (4), /backend/allotments/ (2), /backend/changes/ (1), /backend/reports/ (4). Auto-generated hooks will be available under /frontend/hooks/backend/ for bookings, allotments, changes, and reports directories.

phases.title: Frontend types, CSS, and UI components
phases.description:
Goal: Copy shared types, global CSS, and all six UI component files from the imported source into /frontend/.

Source → target mapping rows:
| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/data/types.ts | /frontend/pages/data/types.ts | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/frontend/styles/global.css | /frontend/styles/global.css | A | Byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/AllotmentsSection.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/AllotmentsSection.tsx | A | Byte-identical; imports ../../lib/shadcn/card and ../../lib/shadcn/skeleton already match sandbox paths |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/ChangesSection.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/ChangesSection.tsx | A | Byte-identical; all relative imports match sandbox |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/DataModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/DataModal.tsx | A | Byte-identical |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/ManualBookingModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/ManualBookingModal.tsx | A | Byte-identical |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/ChangeBookingModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/ChangeBookingModal.tsx | A | Byte-identical |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/BillingDetailsModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/BillingDetailsModal.tsx | A | Byte-identical |

Tool selection rule: Class A → copy file.
Row ordering: Copy types.ts and global.css first, then UI components (they import from types.ts).
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
phases.notes: types.ts, global.css, and all 6 UI component files copied byte-identical. /frontend/styles/global.css will need to be imported in App.tsx or index.tsx during the routing/wiring phase.

phases.title: Frontend pages and App.tsx routing
phases.description:
Goal: Copy Dashboard.tsx and ReportsTab.tsx page components, then update App.tsx to replace the StarterCanvas placeholder with React Router routing.

Source → target mapping rows:
| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/Dashboard.tsx | /frontend/pages/Dashboard.tsx | A | Byte-identical; all imports (../lib/shadcn/*, ../hooks/backend/*, ./ui/*, ./ReportsTab, ./data/types) already match sandbox paths |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ReportsTab.tsx | /frontend/pages/ReportsTab.tsx | A | Byte-identical; all imports already match sandbox paths |
| /imported-source/frontend/App.tsx | /frontend/App.tsx | B | Replace entire file content with source App.tsx: imports Routes/Route/Navigate from react-router-dom, imports Dashboard from ./pages/Dashboard, imports ./styles/global.css, renders <Routes> with one Route path="/" element=Dashboard and a catch-all Navigate to="/". Remove the existing StarterCanvas-based content entirely. |

Tool selection rule: Class A → copy file. Class B → copy file FIRST then edit applying transform notes.
Row ordering: Copy Dashboard.tsx and ReportsTab.tsx first (pages), then update App.tsx last (importer).
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
phases.notes: Dashboard.tsx and ReportsTab.tsx copied byte-identical. App.tsx now uses React Router with a single "/" → Dashboard route and catch-all Navigate redirect. global.css imported in App.tsx as required.

phases.title: Review the imported app for gaps and queue fix phases
phases.description:
Review the completed target app against the imported source under
/imported-source/. Identify import gaps, but do not fix them inline in this
phase.

Compare the source and target coverage for:
- routes & pages
- components
- backend functions
- serverless / edge / custom server routes
- dependencies
- styling & theming
- auth / env / assumptions

Additionally:
- run the project's build/typecheck to check for any remaining errors
- check the /plans/import-build-plan.json for any remaining deferred gaps that did not get addressed in later phases

For material gaps / build errors, append focused fix phase(s) with
`extend_phased_build_plan`. Each appended phase should be self-contained and small
enough for one context window.

Keep any comparison notes private or in tool arguments only; do not narrate the full
audit to the user. Do not re-queue gaps already covered by existing phases.

When all identified gaps have been queued, call `complete_build_phase`. If no gaps
are found, call `complete_build_phase` without appending phases.
